name: Lucille
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: The crown of the collection — a top-floor two-bedroom residence with a private terrace above the rooftops.
description: The crown of the collection — a top-floor two-bedroom residence of over 150 square metres gross with a private terrace of almost 35 square metres above the rooftops of Green Coast, Palasë. The terrace holds the long view over the resort towards the Ionian — made for evenings outdoors.
highlights: The largest residence in the collection
Top floor, long views to the Ionian
location_h2: Green Coast, Palasë — the Albanian Riviera
location_body: Green Coast sits on the Palasë stretch of the Albanian Riviera, where the Ceraunian hillside drops to the Ionian. The resort is built as a stone village — plazas, promenades and pools threaded between terraced buildings — with a Blue Flag beach below and Himarë along the coast. It is Albania's most established seaside address, and the residences sit inside it rather than alongside it.
